title: Study being done to create more parking spaces in Seri Kembangan
snippet: A CONSULTANT has been engaged to study ways to increase parking availability around the future market site at Jalan Pasar, Kampung Baru Seri Kembangan, to address severe congestion and lack of facilities.

title: MRT Putrajaya Line feeder bus trials for Seri Kembangan extended
snippet: MRT Putrajaya Line feeder bus trials for Seri Kembangan have been extended to improve first-mile and last-mile connectivity for commuters, specifically targeting residential zones lacking direct rail access.

title: Seri Kembangan businesses affected after parking space boarded up
snippet: Closure of an open-air carpark at Jalan SK10/3, Seri Kembangan for a commercial project has led to local traders complaining of a drop in business and increased roadside traffic hazards.
